title: Front Office Manager - McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Event Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
